title: Benji's OP Fruit Trees
description: A mod that aims to add a breath of fresh air to the fruit scene in Minecraft
body: Benji's OP Fruit Trees aims to open up the world of Minecraft with 3 new fruits. Adventure around the world to find these fruits, and use the power of the corrupted nether star to craft them into some of the strongest armor the game has seen. With potion effects tied to each fruit, this mod provides new ways of powering up for exploration and battle.
